sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39135" key="e)pi/deipnon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίδειπν-ον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n39135.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">second</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">course, dessert</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:664e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">664e</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
